fails with `scanpy=1.10.4` because the `sc.get.obs_df(adata, col_for_color)` getter casts `col_for_color` if it is a str to a list. Easy fix is cast the output to a Series since the output should always a single column in our case.

This was produced with `spatialdata-plot=v0.2.7`.

https://github.com/scverse/scanpy/blob/02cb8c0f04580d02ca0a691d5becc8f2fa6c2ee0/src/scanpy/get/get.py#L324C5-L324C22
